weekly_summary: Over the past 7 days, our security landscape has been characterized by 23 total findings, with 12 unique CVEs tracked, including CVE-2026-1340, which was most frequently seen. The most active day was April 7, 2026, with various security domains impacted, including AI and ML threats, browser extensions, and containers and Kubernetes. Multiple CVEs, such as CVE-2026-39987, CVE-2026-21904, and CVE-2025-13914, were also identified, affecting areas like crypto libraries, identity and authentication, and operating system kernels, highlighting the need for continued vigilance across these domains.
